cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which statement about Wu Jinyou is true, based on the given article. The options are A, B, C, D. Here's the relevant part: "Wu Jinyou, head of the Polar Research Institute of China, and the group's leader, said, 'I hope the students have not only a field trip to the Yellow River station, but are also touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers here. I also expect in the future, some of them will choose to devote themselves to polar research and maybe even work with us.'" So, Wu Jinyou is the head of the Polar Research Institute of China and the group's leader. His statements express that he values the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers, as he mentions hoping the students are "touched by the devotion and spirit." Also, he hopes some of the students might become polar researchers. Now let's look at the options: A) He is a graduate from Dalian Marinetime University. The article mentions Zheng Li as a student from Dalian Marinetime University majoring in telecommunications. There's no information about Wu Jinyou's education, so A is probably incorrect. B) He is the president of Dalian Marinetime University. Again, no mention of him being affiliated with Dalian Marinetime University. He's the head of the Polar Research Institute of China, not the university. So B is likely wrong. C) He thinks highly of the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. This aligns with his statement where he hopes the students are "touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers here." So this is likely correct.
